title: Sort subitems in Dashboard view
excerpt: Within Dashboard views, where I am viewing multiple boards at once, I would like to sort the items and/or the subitems by column/ sub-column. This is only enabled in regular board views, but not when viewing a board with…

posts.author: joshryan (Hosh Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Within Dashboard views, where I am viewing multiple boards at once, I would like to sort the items and/or the subitems by column/ sub-column. This is only enabled in regular board views, but not when viewing a board within a dashboard.
If dashboard is the wrong nomenclature, it is currently referred to as a “blank” view with a “table” widget.
